message:
feat(fwc): add heterogeneous batch-file command with dependency graph (bead qnchs.7.2)

Adds `fwc batch-file` (alias `batch-ops`) for executing JSONL files of
mixed operations with dependency ordering. Independent operations are
grouped into parallel execution waves via topological sort.

- batch_file.rs: BatchFile parser, dependency graph validator, cycle detection,
  ExecutionPlan with topological wave computation, OpResult/OpStatus types
- BatchFileArgs with --dry-run, --concurrency, --on-error
- batch_file_dispatch wired into CLI dispatch
- 40 unit tests + 6 integration tests (1057→1126 total)
- Also fixed pipeline code clippy (load_pipeline_definition error handling,
  option_if_let_else) and credential_store doc_markdown/truncation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
